metadata.bbox_semantics: The bbox selects intersecting OSM objects; complete source geometry is retained rather than clipped.
metadata.identity_note: OSM type, ID, version, changeset and element timestamp are preserved independently from PLATEAU identities.
metadata.missing_value_semantics: Absent tags remain absent; unknown level, depth, accessibility and current opening status are not inferred.
limitations: Community completeness, geometry accuracy and freshness are not guaranteed
An absent access restriction is not proof of legal public access or current opening
This snapshot is access context, not a routable or authoritative station graph

tags.addr:street: 札幌市中央区大通西１丁目
tags.name: 大通駅 31
tags.wheelchair:description: エスカレーター出口のみ。出口地上はわくわくホリデーホール。元市民会館と中央バス北一条バス停。障害者トイレは、エレベーター６番、地下鉄東豊線が近い。

tags.addr:street: 札幌市中央区大通西１丁目
tags.wheelchair:description: すぐ近くに障害者トイレ有。エレベーターは地下鉄東豊線地上・地下３Ｆ改札まで。地下２は東西線へ/地下１は南北線へ。

tags.addr:street: 22時半から7時までは使用不可
